---
title: "BVD2 Efficacy Clinical Signs"
author: "Olivia Rippee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(flextable)

```

```{r data}

data_repeated <- read.csv("Efficacy_repeated.csv")

data_individual <- read.csv("Efficacy_individual.csv")

```

```{r}

data <- data_repeated %>%
  left_join(data_individual %>% select(animalID, group), by = "animalID") %>%
  relocate(group, .after = animalID) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    group == 1 ~ "Control",
    group == 2 ~ "Vaccine",
    TRUE ~ as.character(group)))

clinical_signs_cols <- c("attitude", "reseff", "nasaldschrg", "oculardschrg",
  "nasalulcers", "oralulcers", "diarrhea", "cough")

data[clinical_signs_cols] <- lapply(data[clinical_signs_cols], as.numeric)

```

```{r}

# Flag animals as clinically affected if they had >= 2 clinical signs on any day
data_CS <- data %>%
  mutate(affected_today = rowSums(across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols), ~ . >= 2), na.rm = TRUE) >= 1) %>%
  group_by(animalID, group) %>%
  summarize(clinically_affected = any(affected_today), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(clinically_affected) %>%
  arrange(animalID)

```

<br>

```{r}

group_counts <- data_CS %>% count(group)

flextable(group_counts) %>%
  set_caption("Number of Clinically Affected Horses by Group") 

```

<br>

```{r}

animalIDs_by_group <- data_CS %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarize(animalIDs = paste(animalID, collapse = ", "), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(group)

flextable(animalIDs_by_group) %>%
  set_caption("Animal IDs of Clinically Affected Horses by Group") %>%
  width(j = 1, width = 0.72) %>%
  width(j = 2, width = 3.85) 

```

<br>

```{r vaccinate_clinical_summary}

vaccinate_data <- data %>% filter(group == "Vaccine")

# Count number of clinical signs ≥2 per animal per day
vaccinate_daily <- vaccinate_data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(n_signs = sum(c_across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols)) >= 2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(n_signs >= 1) %>%
  select(animalID, group, day, all_of(clinical_signs_cols)) %>%
  arrange(animalID, day)

# Convert daily signs to TRUE/FALSE (≥2)
vaccinate_daily_signs <- vaccinate_daily %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols), ~ . >= 2))

# Summarize by animal
vaccinate_summary <- vaccinate_daily_signs %>%
  group_by(animalID, group) %>%
  summarize(
    `Days Affected` = n(),
    `Clinical Signs Observed` = paste(
      names(which(colSums(across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols))) > 0)),
      collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(`Days Affected` > 0) %>%
  rename(`Animal ID` = animalID, `Group` = group) %>%
  arrange(`Animal ID`)

flextable(vaccinate_summary) %>%
  set_caption("Summary of Clinically Affected Vaccinated Animals") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(j = 1:3, align = "center", part = "all")

```

\pagebreak

```{r control_clinical_summary}

control_data <- data %>% filter(group == "Control")

# Count number of clinical signs ≥2 per animal per day
control_daily <- control_data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(n_signs = sum(c_across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols)) >= 2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(n_signs >= 1) %>%
  select(animalID, group, day, all_of(clinical_signs_cols)) %>%
  arrange(animalID, day)

# Convert daily signs to TRUE/FALSE (≥2)
control_daily_signs <- control_daily %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols), ~ . >= 2))

# Summarize by animal
control_summary <- control_daily_signs %>%
  group_by(animalID, group) %>%
  summarize(
    `Days Affected` = n(),
    `Clinical Signs Observed` = paste(
      names(which(colSums(across(all_of(clinical_signs_cols))) > 0)),
      collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(`Days Affected` > 0) %>%
  rename(`Animal ID` = animalID, `Group` = group) %>%
  arrange(`Animal ID`)

flextable(control_summary) %>%
  set_caption("Summary of Clinically Affected Control Animals") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(j = 1:3, align = "center", part = "all")

```
